rawContent: {"stage":"review-fix","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"Build stage produced zero src/ changes — only modified .kody/ metadata, logs, and skill docs. No implementation was generated.","scope":"kody pipeline"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"When a task verifies pipeline behavior (fallback) vs. implementing features, a failed build still validates the test scenario (sub-task failure → fallback).","scope":"kody pipeline"}]}
